en.extract:
The yellow-billed nuthatch (Sitta solangiae) is a species of bird in the family Sittidae. It is found in Hainan, Laos, and Vietnam.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''yellow-billed nuthatch''' ('''''Sitta solangiae''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Sittidae]]. It is found in [[Hainan]], [[Laos]], and [[Vietnam]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

zh.extract:
绒额鳾（学名：Sitta solangiae）为鳾科鳾属的鸟类，體長約13公分。分布於中國、寮國與越南，主要棲息於低地森林或山地森林；全球活动范围约为23,700平方公里。
